name: Pilbara Gold Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$0.5959. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$0.5959, stop A$0.4900, target A$0.6150. Risk/reward is 0.18:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
